center.name: Baoruco Mountain Range
center.summary: Baoruco Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括La Selle thrush、Hispaniolan crossbill、Grey-crowned palm-tanager等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Dominican Republic, it is rarely found in the north and south slopes of the Sierra de Baoruco, as well as on the southern part of Loma de Toro and Hoyo de Pelempito

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Dominican Republic it is found in the Sierra de Bahoruco and Cordillera Central. A few individuals in Jamaica's Blue Mountains in the 1970s are believed to have been vagrants. The species inhabits forests of Hispaniolan pine (Pinus occidentalis)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southeastern Haiti's Chaîne de la Selle and east into the Baoruco Mountain Range in southwestern Dominican Republic

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the former it is found in the Cordillera Central, Sierra de Bahoruco, and Sierra de Neiba
